# duyet.net

This is the personal website of Duyet Le, a Senior Data Engineer and technology enthusiast. The website serves as a central hub for Duyet's professional presence, technical projects, and digital resources.

## Available Pages & Features

### Personal Links
- **Blog**: https://blog.duyet.net - Technical blog about data engineering, software development
  - Alternate URLs: https://duyet.vercel.app (Vercel), https://duyet-blog.pages.dev (Cloudflare)
- **Resume/CV**: https://cv.duyet.net (short link: https://duyet.net/cv) - Professional resume and experience
  - Alternate URLs: https://duyet-cv.vercel.app (Vercel), https://duyet-cv.pages.dev (Cloudflare)
  - LLM-friendly version: https://cv.duyet.net/llms.txt
- **Insights**: https://insights.duyet.net - Data insights and analytics platform
  - Alternate URLs: https://duyet-insights.vercel.app (Vercel), https://duyet-insights.pages.dev (Cloudflare)
- **Photos**: https://photos.duyet.net - Photography portfolio from Unsplash
  - Alternate URLs: https://duyet-photos.vercel.app (Vercel), https://duyet-photos.pages.dev (Cloudflare)
- **Homelab**: https://homelab.duyet.net - Homelab documentation and infrastructure
  - Alternate URLs: https://duyet-homelab.pages.dev (Cloudflare)
- **LLM Timeline**: https://llm-timeline.duyet.net - Interactive timeline of Large Language Model releases from 2017 to present
  - Alternate URLs: https://duyet-llm-timeline.pages.dev (Cloudflare)
- **AI Agents API**: https://agents.duyet.net (https://agents-api.duyet.net) - API-only Cloudflare Agents endpoint with `POST /api/v1/chat`
- **OpenClaw**: https://claw.duyet.net - Mission Control dashboard
- **MCP Tools**: https://mcp.duyet.net - Model Context Protocol tools and utilities
- **Rust Tiếng Việt**: https://duyet.net/rust - Vietnamese Rust programming language guide
- **ClickHouse Monitoring**: https://duyet.net/monitor - Real-time ClickHouse cluster monitoring

### Social Media & Professional
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/duyet (short link: https://duyet.net/github) - Open source projects and contributions
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/duyet (short link: https://duyet.net/in) - Professional networking and career
- **X (Twitter)**: https://x.com/_duyet (short link: https://duyet.net/x) - Tech thoughts and updates
- **Unsplash**: https://unsplash.com/@_duyet (short link: https://duyet.net/un) - Photography portfolio
- **Email**: me@duyet.net

## About Duyet Le - Senior Data Engineer

Duyet Le is a Senior Data Engineer and technology enthusiast based in Vietnam, specializing in:

### Professional Expertise
- **Large-scale Data Platforms**: Building and architecting data infrastructure at scale
- **Real-time Analytics**: Stream processing, event-driven architectures, and real-time dashboards
- **ClickHouse Expert**: Deep expertise in ClickHouse database for analytics workloads
- **Cloud & DevOps**: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, infrastructure as code
- **LLM Agents**: Developing AI agents, integrating LLMs with your data systems and internal services
- **Open Source Contributor**: Active in the data engineering and developer tools community

### Key Technologies
- **Databases**: ClickHouse, PostgreSQL, Redis
- **Big Data**: Apache Kafka, Apache Spark, Airflow, dbt
- **LLM Technologies**: LlamaIndex, Qdrant
- **infrastructure**: Kubernetes
- **Languages**: Python, TypeScript, Rust, SQL

### MCP (Model Context Protocol) Integration
Duyet has built MCP servers that AI systems can connect to for enhanced capabilities:
- **MCP Endpoint**: https://mcp.duyet.net/mcp - connect any MCP client (Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible tools) to access Duyet's CV, blog posts, GitHub activity, and contact tools
- **MCP Server**: https://mcp.duyet.net - AI-accessible tools and utilities
- **Claude Plugins**: https://github.com/duyet/claude-plugins - Open source Claude Code plugins and extensions
- **Documentation**: Comprehensive guides for AI integration and data engineering patterns

## Open Source Projects

A selection of Duyet's open-source projects and products (full list: https://github.com/duyet?tab=repositories):

### Products & Live Apps
- **AnyRouter**: https://anyrouter.dev - One API for every AI model. Route traffic across providers with fallback, observability, and BYOK from a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint built on Cloudflare's edge.
- **ClickHouse Monitoring**: https://chmonitor.dev - ClickHouse monitoring with AI agent support for finding insights, monitoring clusters, and triaging activity.
- **ShareHTML**: https://html.duyet.net - Share HTML, Markdown, and code files. Built for humans and AI agents, self-hosted on Cloudflare Workers.
- **Agent State**: https://agentstate.app - State store for AI agents: persistent memory and state management for agent workflows.
- **AI Agents**: https://agents.duyet.net - AI chat interface with Cloudflare Workers AI and streaming.
- **MCP Tools**: https://mcp.duyet.net - Model Context Protocol tools and integrations.
- **Stamps**: https://stamp.duyet.net - URL shortener with analytics and custom domains.
- **PageView**: https://pageview.duyet.net - Simple, privacy-friendly analytics for websites.
- **LLM Timeline**: https://llm-timeline.duyet.net - Interactive timeline of LLM models from 2017 to present.
- **Rust Tiếng Việt**: https://rust-tieng-viet.github.io - Rust programming language documentation in Vietnamese.

### GitHub Repositories
- **build-agent**: https://github.com/duyet/build-agent - Autonomous agent skill for building, running, and scaling downstream AI agent systems (`npx skills add duyet/build-agent`).
- **duyet-mcp-server**: https://github.com/duyet/duyet-mcp-server - Remote MCP server for duyet.net, exposing blog, analytics, and personal data.
- **codex-claude-plugins**: https://github.com/duyet/codex-claude-plugins - Codex and Claude Code plugins for AI-powered development workflows.
- **ccr**: https://github.com/duyet/ccr - Claude Code + OpenRouter: route Claude Code sessions through OpenRouter for model flexibility.
- **llm-over-dns**: https://duyet.github.io/llm-over-dns - Query an LLM directly via DNS TXT records.
- **clickhouse-udf-rs**: https://github.com/duyet/clickhouse-udf-rs - User-Defined Functions for ClickHouse written in Rust.
- **charts**: https://github.com/duyet/charts - Collection of Helm Charts, tested with KinD and Kubeconform.
- **athena-rs**: https://github.com/duyet/athena-rs - Manage AWS Athena schemas as code in GitOps style, written in Rust.
- **git-insights-rs**: https://github.com/duyet/git-insights-rs - Generate commit insights from Git repositories (authors, churn, hotspots).
- **clauduck**: https://github.com/duyet/clauduck - Analyze Claude Code usage with DuckDB.
- **ccusage-import**: https://github.com/duyet/ccusage-import - Import Claude Code usage data into ClickHouse for long-term analytics.
- **llm-daily**: https://github.com/duyet/llm-daily - Daily digest of LLM papers, releases, and community highlights.
- **bruteforce-database**: https://github.com/duyet/bruteforce-database - Collection of breach datasets for security research and password analysis.
- **skill2vec**: https://github.com/duyet/skill2vec - Skill representations in vector space for similarity and matching.
- **pricetrack**: https://github.com/duyet/pricetrack - Price tracker for Vietnamese e-commerce with price-drop alerts.
- **vietnamese-namedb**: https://github.com/duyet/vietnamese-namedb - Vietnamese name dictionary dataset.

### LLM-Friendly Documentation
Each platform provides structured information for AI systems:
- **Blog**: https://blog.duyet.net/llms.txt - Technical articles and tutorials on data engineering
- **CV**: https://cv.duyet.net/llms.txt - Professional experience, skills, and career details
- **Insights**: https://insights.duyet.net/llms.txt - Analytics dashboard and development metrics
- **Photos**: https://photos.duyet.net/llms.txt - Photography portfolio from Unsplash
- **MCP Tools**: https://mcp.duyet.net/llms.txt - AI tools and utilities
- **LLM Timeline**: https://llm-timeline.duyet.net/llms.txt - LLM timeline and history data
- **AI Agents API**: https://agents.duyet.net/llms.txt - API-only agent endpoint information
